Scripting Your Prelaunch
Content
Module 4
I’m giving you Skeleton Scripts (outlines
for you to use / think about / work off of
when you’re scripting out your PLCs)
Scripting your PLCs…
• I recommend you script them out even if you
don’t deliver your PLCs from a script
• This will help you know what you want to say
• You can’t just turn on your camera and nail this
• Write out word for word your entire script

Scripting your PLCs…
• How you deliver them is up to you
• Bullet points
• White boards
• Post-in notes
• Teleprompter
Download the Skeleton Script below (PDF)
Prelaunch Content 1 (PLC 1) includes:
• Intro and positioning
• Show the opportunity
• Share your launch story
• One story that arcs through the 3 pieces of PLC
• Teach – share a secret or two
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Prelaunch Content 1 (PLC 1) includes:
• Raise objections and answer them right from the
beginning
• Foreshadow PLC 2
• Call to action
Prelaunch Content 2 (PLC 2) includes:
• Intro and positioning
• Recap last video and tell them what’s covered in
this one
• Recap the opportunity
• Recap your positioning
Prelaunch Content 2 (PLC 2) includes:
• Present a case study and / or do some real
teaching
• Objection crushing
• Call to action
• Foreshadow PLC 3
• Final call to action
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Prelaunch Content 3 (PLC 3) includes:
• Introduction
• Possibly a short case study
• Answer top questions you’ve been getting
• Explain the big view
Prelaunch Content 3 (PLC 3) includes:
• Pivot to your offer and create a soft landing
• Seed the scarcity of your launch offer
• Call to action
How to put together your scripts…
• Download the Skeleton Script PDF below
• Script out your entire Prelaunch Content (whether
you use it to deliver your Prelaunch Content or
not)
